title: Croatian Frittata with Fennel
description: A delicious and savory Croatian-inspired frittata filled with fennel and perfect for breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: Large eggs are best for a rich and creamy frittata.

ingredients.name: fennel
ingredients.notes: Use the white and light green parts of the fennel for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: chewy
ingredients.notes: Chopped chewy texture for added interest.

ingredients.name: croatian
ingredients.notes: Add a drizzle of Croatian olive oil or use as a flavor inspiration for your dish.

instructions: In a large skillet, heat some oil over medium heat. Add the chopped fennel and cook until it's tender, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked fennel to the bowl with the eggs and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
Bake the frittata in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until it's set and golden brown on top.
Remove the frittata from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with chopped fennel or a sprinkle of paprika, if desired.
